title: VolcanoWatch: Budgeted Batch Design for Maximum Pareto Hypervolume on a DTLZ2 Surrogate
strategies: trivial: commission B identical center configurations -> collapses to one Pareto point (matches baseline)
greedy: sit on the trade-off surface (distance vars = 0.5) but sweep only one position variable -> a coarse 1D arc
strong: on-surface space-filling grid over all position variables plus extreme axis points -> covers the full front
